name: hlprivateer.xyz
description: Self-hosted, TypeScript-first, agentic Hyperliquid trading platform

scripts.format: echo 'format not wired; run package-specific formatters as needed'
scripts.deploy:web:cloudflare: cd apps/web && NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=${NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL:-https://api.hlprivateer.xyz} NEXT_PUBLIC_WS_BASE_URL=${NEXT_PUBLIC_WS_BASE_URL:-wss://ws.hlprivateer.xyz} bun run build:static && cd ../.. && $(command -v npx) --yes wrangler pages deploy apps/web/out --project-name hlprivateer-xyz --branch main
